stemHtml: With regard to a piston engine, the relationship between the compression ratio and the required fuel octane rating is: the..

options.a: required octane rating is independent of the compression ratio.
options.b: higher the compression ratio, the lower the octane rating required.
options.c: higher the compression ratio, the higher the octane rating required.
options.d: lower the compression ratio, the higher the octane rating required.
